chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Justice is Obligatory Towards the Camel, Avoiding Beating it, and Refraining From Oppressing it

text: 2495 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَيُّ بَعِيرٍ حُجَّ عَلَيْهِ ثَلاَثَ سِنِينَ يُجْعَلُ مِنْ نَعَمِ اَلْجَنَّةِ » وَ رُوِيَ «سَبْعَ سِنِينَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2495 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Any camel on which Hajj is performed for three years will be counted among the livestock of Paradise."
In another narration, it is reported as "seven years."
